titleStmt.title: SII 27.363: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 363. (A.R. No. 324 of 1931-32.) SURĀLA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the compound of Mahāliṇgēśvara temple.

This is dated Śaka 1370 (current), Prajōtpatti, Chaitra śu. 1, Thursday. The details are slightly irregular. The cyclic year given corresponded to Śaka 1373 (expired) when the tithi occurred on 1451 A. D., March 4. In Śaka 1370, Vibhava, the tithi occured on 1448 A.D., March 6 when the week-day was Wednesday. The former, therefore, appears to be the intended date.

It registers a gift of land by Bemmiseṭṭy for feeding seven brahmiṇas in the maṭha attached to the temple of Mahādēva of Sūrāla, during the time of Nāgañcha Toḷaha and his younger brother Bemmaṇañcha Toḷaha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ namaḥ . namastuṁga siraḥ
cuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbhaṁ mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁ
bhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruśa 1370 neya naḍava vartamāna vevahārika prajō
tpatya saṁvatcharada cayitra su 1 guruvāradalu śrīmatu sakalaguṇa saṁpaṁnarappa nāgaṁ
ca toḷahara kāladali Avarataṁma beṁmaṇaṁcaru kumāravṛttiya naḍava kāla
dali sūrāla śrī mahādēvara saṁnidhiyalli haluvaḷira baṁdu maṁda Aḍahara taṁma
saluvaḷiya beṁmiseṭṭi yēḷumaṁdi brāhmaṇarige dinacariyadalu tsatranaḍava maryā
deyali Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi barasida śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare yī dharṁmake biṭa bāḷa
koṭiti baḷada Oḷage beṁmiseṭi toḷahara kaiyali mūlava koṁḍabāḷina catussīmeya
vivara mūḍalu teruva da gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu bettilana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ ba
ḍagalu paḍuvalu kalumaṭhada gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu haḍagalu maḍilana gaḍiyiṁ
daṁ teṁkalu yi catusīmeyiṁda Oḷage bittuva bede gaṇilu nāgaṁḍugadalu mū
ḍe yi bāḷiṁge gēṇi hadināṟara hāneyalu nāghaṁḍugadali Akki hadimūṟu mu 13
gātrada keṁcakaṁḍikada Oḷage śaṁkarana makkaḷa kayyalu mūlava koṁḍa bāḷina
catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu tōḍiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu dresaṁkarana
gaḷa bāḷina gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu meladalu paḍilana gaḍiyiṁ
daṁ mūḍalu baḍaga bā dreya saṁkana makaḷa malagadeya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu
yiṁtī catusīmeyiṁdaṁ Oḷage bittuva baḷadagaṇilu nāgaṁḍugadalu bayala ga
demū 3 yi bāḷiṁ gēṇi hadināṟara hāneyali nāghaṁḍugadalu Akkimū 11 hā
mattaṁ keṁcakaṁḍikada paḍuva beṭṭana Oḷage Uḍupatkaḷa kayyali mūlavakoṁḍa bāḷina
catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu Arasamaṁḍana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu
vrittiyavara Oyala kalla gaddeya tōḍiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu baṁṭa
hatariṁda mūḍalu baḍagalu paḍilakaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī
catusīmeyiṁda Oḷage bayala moḷakeya gade nāghaṁḍugadalu mū 50 yi bāḷi
ge gēṇi hadināṟara hāneyali nāghaṁḍugadali mū 16 . Akki mattaṁ mayi
yoḷage beṁmiseṭi kattaleguṁḍiya saṁkara Akiyana kayyali A
catusīmaya vivara mūḍalu sāliṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu beṁmiseṭi to
ḷaha gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu kaṁṇāṟana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu
ṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyiṁdaṁ Oḷage bittuva bedegaṇilu nāghaṁḍuga
mū 25 yi bāḷiṁgēṇi nāghaṁḍugadalu Akkimū 16 hadinā Ara hāneyali
kaḷada Arttha kāṭi ga 180 yi bāḷiṁge baṁda sthala hoḍekaṭṭu sa koṭṭare Arttha
Adake Oṁdu haṇava taṁbugeyali yikki Eṟaudu mattaṁ mayimadiyo
ḷage beṁmiseṭṭi Akiyana kayyalu mūlavakoṁḍa bāḷina catusīmeya vivara
mūḍalu tōḍiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu pēdilana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu
saṁkara Akiyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu kattale guṁḍiya śaṁkara Akiyana ga
deyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyiṁda Oḷage bittuva bedegaṇilu nāghaṁḍu
gadalumu 12 . yi bāḷiṁge gēṇi hadināṟara hāneyali nāghaṁḍugadali Aki
mū 10 naḍasi baharu yi śāsanadali baredaṁthā mūlada bāḷu Arvvārada bāḷina mu
Aṁttu Akki nāghaṁḍugadali mu 70 Akkige yēḷumaṁdi brāhmaṇarige
ḍalu Āyartha yetusahitavāgi tsatravanu naḍasuvadu
yi śāsanadali baradaṁthā mūla Arvārada bāḷina mēlaṇa teṟu Osage Anāyaka Ē
nu Uḷaṁthādanu beṁmiseṭṭi hoṁna koṭṭu mūlakrayavakoṁḍu teṟu Osa
ge Avu lli sarvvamānyaveṁdu barada śilāśāsana yiṁtoppudakke nā
gaṁca toḷahara Oppa śrī mahādēvaru kumāra vritti beṁmaṇaṁcaru mahā
dēvaru yeraḍūra Oppa mahādēvaru nāku ṭhāvina Oṁdutkaḷa Opa mahādēva
ru Opa mahādēvaru tiṁniyaṇa Areyanamaga kriṣṇa Areya Arvāra
va nirisida bāḷina mūḍe bāviyoḷagarddha hiḍiyanu
rvādava biṭṭu barasida śilāśāsana mūliya Oppa gaṇapaṇa sēnabōvana ba
raha dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānātsrēyōnupālanaṁ dānāsvargga mavāpnōti pāla
nādacyutaṁ padaṁ
Digital edition of SII 27.363 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
